meta.poznamky: start_blocks_xml: hřeben bez penDown na konci těla smyčky (za left(90)).

cms.task_text: Hřeben má zuby, ale [hlp]chybí penDown[/hlp] po přesunu. Výsledkem je, že druhý a další zuby se nekreslí. Přidejte penDown na správné místo.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
